post.summary: Create a new proposal or invitation
Hire worker (rejects other proposals, locks escrow)
Submit audit report (updates milestone status on pass/fail)
Resolve a dispute (updates milestone status based on verdict)

patch.summary: Approve or reject expert application (auto-creates user on approval)

post.summary: Reset all data to seed state (superuser only)

info.title: Lannent API
info.description: Complete REST API for the Lannent freelance platform. Supports Users, Tasks, Milestones, Proposals, Audit Requests, Audit Reports, Disputes, Transactions, Expert Applications, and Notifications. Uses in-memory storage with seed data. Include "role" and "user-id" headers for RBAC.
